title: rubus × infrapubens
intro: Rubus × infrapubens, also known as hybrid raspberry or infrapubens raspberry, is a hybrid plant species within the Rubus genus, derived from the cross between Rubus idaeus and Rubus fruticosus. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which contribute to its health benefits. The health benefits of Rubus × infrapubens include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. The plant is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or dried powder for use in herbal remedies, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
